conservative.name: Meteor Storm
conservative.requirements:
8 power
Target(s) within long range. If engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: A shower of meteors streaks from the sky and strikes the target(s) for 6+ Intelligence damage

boon.description: Deal additional damage equal to your depth in the Conservative stance

bane.description: Special: For each target after the first, add to the difficulty modifier and 2 power to the requirements. This spell is opposed by the highest Toughness among its targets

sigmarsComet.description: You may strike an additional target with Toughness no higher than the primary target

reckless.name: Meteor Storm
reckless.requirements:
8 power
Target(s) within long range. If engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: A shower of meteors streaks from the sky and strikes the target(s) for 6+ Intelligence damage
You hit the target(s) for 6+ Intelligence + Willpower damage, plus damage equal to your depth in the Reckless stance

bane.description: Special: For each target after the first, add to the difficulty modifier and 2 power to the requirements. This spell is opposed by the highest Toughness among its targets
